home.notInspector: This account is not an inspector account. You are probably signed in with a customer account.
home.platformAdmin: You are signed in as the platform admin. This account does not inspect itself; manage companies, the catalog and the hero photo via Settings.

serialSearch.title: SN search / Recall
serialSearch.placeholder: Last digits of serial number or description…
serialSearch.hint: Search by (part of) the serial number, or by brand/description.
serialSearch.prompt: Type at least 2 characters to search.
serialSearch.recallIntro: Find all articles in your customer base affected by a recall. Filter by brand, product and manufacture date — e.g. Petzl Astro before October 2023.
serialSearch.recallNeedFilter: Enter at least a brand, product or manufacture year.
serialSearch.recallPrompt: Fill in the filters and search.
serialSearch.recallUnknownNote: {n} article(s) without a manufacture year — shown, but check yourself whether they fall under the recall.
serialSearch.recallPreviewEmpty: No catalogue product found for this search — customers' free-text articles are still searched.

detail.deleteBlockedHistory: This customer cannot be deleted: inspection history exists. Inspection records are legal evidence and are kept.

fields.name: Name *
fields.admin: Admin in the client app (can manage members there)

articles.title: Articles
articles.cantFind: Can't find it? Add as free article

errors.chooseOrDescribe: Choose a product from the catalogue or enter a description.
errors.suggestRequired: For the catalogue queue, brand, description and manual link are required.

detail.retireBody: The article stays on record but no longer counts towards inspections.
detail.deleteNeverInspectedBody: This article has never been on a completed certificate and will be permanently deleted.

sets.title: Sets

detail.noMembers: No articles in this set yet
detail.noneToAdd: No more free articles to add
detail.deleteBody: The articles themselves stay — only the grouping disappears.

addPart.title: Add part
addPart.offline: Linking a part needs a connection.

sets.openDetail: Open set — rename, edit members or delete

login.title: Log in
login.forgotHint: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to set a new password.
login.resetSent: Check your email — we sent you a link to set a new password.

inspections.searchPlaceholder: Search by customer name or date…
inspections.notFound: Inspection not found (it may have been deleted).

selectArticles.title: Which articles belong to this inspection?
selectArticles.hint: Choose everything from this customer, or only the articles that haven't been inspected before.
selectArticles.addTitle: Add more articles from this customer?
selectArticles.addHint: These articles aren't in the open inspection yet. Choose all of them, or only the ones never inspected before.

inspections.filterPlaceholder: Search by serial number or description…
inspections.clearFlag: Clear with a note (hides the flag for this article)
inspections.clearFlagPrompt: Note (e.g. "resolved" or "not within the affected batch"):
inspections.certificateAwaitingSync: Inspection completed, saved offline. The certificate will be generated once you're back online.

table.searchPlaceholder: Search by serial number, description, brand…
table.notAssessedConfirm: {count} item(s) were not inspected and will not appear on the certificate (they remain with the customer for next time):
table.dayHelperTooltip: The day number of the year, often embedded as 3 digits in the serial number. 003 = Jan 3rd, 123 = day 123 of the year (May 1st). Runs up to 365 max (366 in a leap year) — not the same as a calendar date.
table.weekHelperTooltip: The week number of the year (1-53), sometimes embedded in the serial number. A week can span two months, so you may see two months here — pick the correct one yourself.
table.copyLastTooltip: Fills in all fields from the last added article again (without serial number) — handy for multiple identical items.
table.matchTooltip: Match to a catalog article — brand, category and lifespan data will be filled in automatically.
table.noticeHint: Inspection notice known for this product
table.noMatchesFiltered: No article matches your search fields -- complete them and tap + Add to add it as a new article.
table.snReinstateConfirm: "{name}" has been retired{info}. Reinstate it and add it to this inspection?
table.saveRowFailed: The result for "{name}" was NOT saved. Please try again.
table.finishBlockedUnsaved: A result was not saved (see the message above). Save it again before finishing.

inspections.deleteDraftConfirm: Permanently delete the draft for {name} ({date}), including entered results? The customer's articles are kept.

verify.notFound: Certificate not found or invalid link

rejection.title: Rejection codes
rejection.intro: You pick these codes when rejecting an item during an inspection. They apply only to your inspection company; you start from the standard set and adjust it to taste.
rejection.deleteBody: This cannot be undone. Codes already used stay on existing certificates.

certificate.menuDesc: Logo, layout, header and footer of the certificate
certificate.intro: Configure how the inspection certificate looks. The settings apply to your inspection company and to certificates you print from now on; certificates already issued stay unchanged.
certificate.previewNote: Live preview with sample data. Updates as you change settings.
certificate.defaultHeader: Inspections are carried out by trained personnel. The inspection is a visual check of the points listed below for the equipment presented. No rights can be derived from this inspection for any future date; it is a snapshot on the stated inspection date.
certificate.defaultFooter: This certificate is a snapshot on the stated inspection date and is not a guarantee up to any future date.

columns.title: Certificate columns
columns.hint: Tick which columns appear on the certificate. A column only shows when there is actual data; unticked means the data is kept but not printed.
columns.fixed: Always: Article · Brand · Serial number · Status

inspectors.title: Inspectors
inspectors.intro: Manage your company's inspectors and their qualification certificates (competency, IPAF, manufacturer certificates). You can record an inspector before they have their own account.
inspectors.noAccountNote: This inspector has no login account yet. For now you only record their details and qualifications; linking an account can come later.
inspectors.accountNote: This inspector has their own login account. The account itself cannot be deleted here; set it to inactive instead.
inspectors.signatureIntro: Upload a signature (PNG or JPG, preferably on a transparent background). It is placed on the certificate above the signature line, so you no longer have to sign by hand.
inspectors.shareHint: On = a public copy of this document can be viewed via the QR code on the certificate. Off = internal only.
inspectors.deleteBody: This removes the inspector and their qualifications. This cannot be undone. Inspections carried out by this inspector are kept.

import.title: Excel/CSV import
import.intro: Import inspections from an existing Excel or CSV file. You point out the header row and columns yourself — no automatic guessing you can't rely on.
import.pasteLabel: Paste a table (from Word or Excel)
import.pastePlaceholder: Click here and paste with Ctrl+V…
import.pasteHint: In Word, select the whole table, copy (Ctrl+C) and paste above. You then pick the header row and the last row yourself in step 2.
import.pasteNoTable: No table recognised in what you pasted. Select and copy the table again in Word/Excel.
import.step2Title: Step 2: which row is the header row?
import.step2Hint: Click the row with the column names. In some files this only starts on row 10 or later — pick the right row, even if it isn't at the top.
import.step2IgnoreHint: Everything above the chosen header row (greyed out) is not imported — only the rows below it.
import.step2RangeHint: Click the row number to pick the header row. If there's text after the table (legend, signature, totals), click ⤓ on the last row of the table — everything below it is skipped.
import.step3Hint: Tell us what's in each column. We made a guess based on the column name — check and adjust where needed.
import.fixedCustomerHint: Pick an existing customer or create one; all rows then go to that customer. Leave empty if the customer name is a column in the file.
import.pickFromFile: or click a value from the file (above the table)
import.customerFromFile: Customer name from file: {name} — if this customer doesn't exist yet, it will be created during import
import.inspectorHint: Imported inspections are attributed to this inspector — useful when a colleague performed the historical inspections. Default: you.
import.fixedDateLabel: Inspection date for this whole file (optional)
import.fixedDateHint: Fill this in if the inspection date isn't a column anywhere in the file — this date will then apply to all rows instead of a mapped column.
import.duplicateSerials: {count} duplicate serial number(s) found in this file
import.unparsableYears: {count} manufacture year value(s) could not be read — recognised are e.g. "2021", "2021-8", "07/2022" and "May 2021"
import.allGood: No problems found in the dry-run validation.
import.skipDuplicates: Skip existing serial number for this customer (don't duplicate the article)
import.saveProfile: Remember this header row + columns for the next import with the same layout
import.profileApplied: Recognised a previously saved profile and applied it automatically — check and adjust where needed.
import.columnsRecalled: Columns you mapped in earlier imports have been pre-filled — check them and complete the rest.
import.step5Hint: {count} rows will be imported. The original file is kept unchanged as evidence; no new certificate PDF is generated for historical inspections.
import.sumArticlesSkipped: {count} existing article reused (serial number already known)
import.sumSkippedNoCustomer: of which {count} because the customer name was missing — fill in "Customer name for this whole file" in step 3 if the file has no customer column
import.sumSkippedNoDescription: of which {count} because the description/article was missing — map a column to "Description" in step 3

catalog.menuDesc: Manage the product catalogue and review the submission queue

queue.intro: Free-text articles an inspector has submitted for the catalogue. Complete the missing fields and turn them into a real catalogue product, or reject.

manager.search: Search by brand, name or category
manager.duplicate: Copy to new product (e.g. different size)
manager.previewSummary: {create} new, {update} updated, {skip} skipped (error). Review and confirm.
manager.errorMissing: Row {line}: brand and name are required.
manager.errorUnknownId: Row {line}: id {id} does not exist in the catalogue.

listing.menuDesc: Open for new customers + your place on the map
listing.intro: Set your company "open for new customers" to appear on the public map in the customer app. When off, you stay findable only by name search.
listing.coordsHint: The coordinates set your pin on the map. Look up your address on e.g. openstreetmap.org and copy the latitude/longitude.

hero.menuDesc: The mood photo on the main menu, for all inspection companies
hero.intro: This photo appears on the main menu for every inspection company on the platform (not just this one) — meant to change every quarter, e.g. with a customer photo from a social media contest. Separate crops for mobile/tablet (portrait) and desktop (wide).
hero.overlayHint: More darkening = more legible text on busy or bright photos. Applies to the main menu and the header strip.

snref.empty: No brands in the serial reference yet.

companies.menuDesc: Create inspection companies and link admins
companies.intro: Create a new inspection company and link a first admin. After that, the company manages its own inspectors and customers via Settings → Inspectors.
companies.title: Inspection companies
companies.noInspectors: No inspectors at this company yet.
companies.addInspectorHint: If an account already exists for this email, it links right away. If not, a button appears to send an invite (magic link). They'll be moved to this company if they were already an inspector elsewhere.
companies.inviteSent: Invite sent. As soon as that person opens the link, the link-up is active right away.
companies.setPasswordHint: Choose a password for this inspector (min. 8 characters). Handy if the invite email doesn't arrive: share the password and they can log in straight away with their email address + password.
companies.setPasswordDone: Password set. Share it together with the email address with the inspector.
companies.deleteBody: {name} will be deleted permanently, including inspector links and settings. This is only possible while the company has not performed any inspections yet; customer companies themselves remain.
companies.logoHint: Logo, brand color and header/footer text are managed by the company itself via Settings → Certificate template, once an admin is linked.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

security.menuDesc: Set or change your own password
security.intro: Set a password here so you can log in on any device with your email address + password (no email link needed).
security.saved: Password saved. From now on you can log in with your email address + password.
security.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

offline.title: Offline downloads
offline.empty: No customers downloaded for offline use yet.
offline.cannotLoadCustomers: Could not load the customer list -- are you online?

locked.setupHint: Set up a PIN to store customer data encrypted offline.
locked.unlockHint: Enter your PIN to unlock offline storage.

pin.setupHint: This PIN encrypts customer data you store offline. Choose a PIN you'll easily remember on inspection day.
pin.resetWarning: Note: this will lose access to any offline data from before this reset that hasn't synced yet. Only possible with an internet connection.
pin.deviceWarning: Note: anyone with both this device and your PIN can access the offline data -- same as any other offline app. Protect your device with a screen lock.
pin.tooShort: PIN must be at least 4 characters.

offline.notCachedInspection: This inspection is not cached locally -- go online to fetch it.
offline.staleWarning: Not synced for 14 days -- check your connection or remove the download.
offline.pendingOn: Downloaded on {date}, {count} change(s) waiting to sync
offline.onlineOnlyAction: This action requires a connection -- try again once you're back online.

cheatSheet.title: Cheat sheet — day/week & serial reference
cheatSheet.invalidDay: Does not exist in this year
cheatSheet.legend: Y = year · M = month · D = day number · W = week · x = other digit · # = letter

catalogSuggest.title: Suggest for the catalogue
catalogSuggest.intro: Fill in the product details as completely as you can. After you submit, the catalogue curator reviews them and turns them into a real catalogue product.
catalogSuggest.offline: Suggesting for the catalogue is only available online.

requests.title: Inspection requests
requests.acceptConfirm: Link {customer} to your inspection company? Any link with another company will be ended.
